message:
fix(rpc): copy recentMutations to new slice to prevent memory leak (bd-14)

The previous [1:] reslice kept the original backing array alive,
preventing GC of dropped head elements. Replace with copy to a fresh
slice so the old backing array becomes unreachable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
